name: Can Siri use my content if it is not highly technical?
description: Yes. Simple, natural-language content is often better for Siri than jargon-heavy copy.

mainEntity.name: Can Siri use my content if it is not highly technical?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if your content is phrased the way people actually speak. Siri is designed for voice interaction, so natural-language questions and direct answers are a better fit than abstract marketing claims. Keep the answer short, factual, and easy to lift.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Simple, natural-language content is often better for Siri than jargon-heavy copy.
